question: Describe Cascade Semiconductor Corp.'s business strategy, primary risk factors, and financial performance for fiscal year 2024.
answer: Cascade Semiconductor Corp. designs and manufactures advanced logic chips for data center and AI applications [c1]. Its primary risk factors include supply chain concentration, customer concentration, semiconductor cyclicality, and geopolitical risks [c2]. Financially, fiscal year 2024 revenue was $21,300 million with gross profit of $12,150 million and net income of $5,940 million [c3].

retrieved.text: Cascade Semiconductor Corp. designs, develops, and manufactures advanced logic semiconductor devices, focusing primarily on data center accelerators and artificial intelligence processing units. The company's strategy centers on maintaining technology leadership through sustained R&D investment and deep customer partnerships.

Risk factors include: (1) supply chain concentration — certain key substrates are sourced from sole-source suppliers; (2) customer concentration — top three customers represented 61% of fiscal year 2024 revenue; (3) semiconductor cyclicality — demand fluctuations can significantly impact revenue; (4) geopolitical risk — primary manufacturing facilities are located in Southeast Asia.

Net income for fiscal year 2024 was $5,940 million, or $11.88 per diluted share, compared to net income of $4,720 million in fiscal year 2023. The increase reflects higher revenue and improved operating leverage.
